behaviors.description: Missing required key from both file and environment reports exact dotted config path (e.g., `database.host`).
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at a handoff boundary (file values + env overrides + validation/error formatting). A unit test of only the validator could miss bugs where merge/lookup drops path context. REAL-INFRA: no subprocess/network/external API; local temp file/env wiring is sufficient. MOCK-HIDE: mocking file/env loaders can hide real merge-path bugs. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System/Agentic/Workflow because behavior text is only local config loading and error reporting, with no real OS primitive beyond normal file/env access and no AI step.
behaviors.test_description: In a temp config directory, write YAML missing `database.host`, clear `TOOL_DATABASE_HOST`, run loader with real env+file modules, assert startup failure message includes exact `database.host`.

behaviors.description: `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` changes config resolution base from `~/.config` to the XDG directory.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: behavior is specifically env-to-path-resolution-to-file-load wiring across modules. Unit-testing a path helper alone may miss loader using wrong base path. REAL-INFRA: no subprocess/network; temp filesystem is enough. INTEGRATION-BRAKE: (a) no required real OS/network/subprocess semantics beyond local file operations, (b) no AI output dependency, (c)(d) no agentic chaining/orchestration. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text only requires correct local path resolution and read.
behaviors.test_description: Set `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` to a temp dir containing config file; ensure home `~/.config/tool/config.yaml` is absent or different; run loader and assert it reads from XDG path.

behaviors.description: `TOOL_` environment variable overrides conflicting config-file key.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure appears at module boundary where parsed YAML and env-derived values are merged with precedence rules. Unit testing precedence function alone can miss mapping/normalization issues in env loader. REAL-INFRA: no subprocess/network/external API needed. INTEGRATION-BRAKE checks all higher-level triggers: none apply. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Agentic/Workflow/System because behavior text is deterministic local config precedence only.
behaviors.test_description: Create config file with key `database.host: filehost`, set `TOOL_DATABASE_HOST=envhost`, run loader end-to-end in-process, assert resulting config value is `envhost`.

behaviors.description: YAML syntax errors report the detected line number in the actionable error.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-HIDE: mocking YAML parsing can always pass and miss real parser exception shape/line metadata. Needs real YAML parser + loader error wrapping together. REAL-INFRA: still in-process, no subprocess/network/external API. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because no real external system boundary is required beyond local file read and parser call.
behaviors.test_description: Write malformed YAML in temp config file (known bad line), invoke loader, assert failure message includes the parser-reported line number.

behaviors.description: If config directory is missing at startup, loader creates it and writes defaults before continuing.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: behavior spans existence check, directory creation, file write, then subsequent load/continue path; cross-module state handoff is the failure boundary. REAL-INFRA: local filesystem interaction is required but can be done with temp dirs (no subprocess/network). INTEGRATION-BRAKE: no need for higher levels; no AI/model dependency or multi-agent sequence. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text does not require OS-specific watcher/event/timing semantics, only standard create/write operations.
behaviors.test_description: Start with non-existent temp `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` (or isolated HOME), run loader, assert directory and defaults file now exist with expected baseline keys, and loader proceeds without fatal error.
